provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and use-wear detail, visible brushstrokes, same type of Compact equipment panel after twenty years of service — paint mostly gone revealing multiple primer layers and bare metal, replacement buttons that don't match originals, tape repair on screen bezel, handwritten label replacing printed one that wore off, one section bypassed with exposed wiring, a veteran machine, item study on plain background
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new, glamorous, luxury, people, characters, figures, text, watermark, blurry, low quality

judgment.explanation: Lived-in detail — domestic objects in industrial spaces, paper ephemera, mundane commercial spaces, weathering progression, fabric on machinery. The details that make a universe breathe.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Not generic sci-fi — reads as faction-specific and lived-in
